chunk_00012.text_preview: The Company shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of:

chunk_00013.text_preview:
1. Consequential loss, depreciation, wear and tear, or mechanical and electrical breakdown, failures, or breakages,

chunk_00016.text_preview:

ambient temperature changes.

chunk_00017.text_preview:

breakage of the lamp housing o

chunk_00018.text_preview: 6. Condensation or fogging inside lamp assemblies not accompanied by physical damage to the lamp housing itself.

chunk_00019.text_preview:

driver's field of vision.

chunk_00020.text_preview:
8. Tyre wear and tread depth below the legal minimum limit, or damage arising from driving on tyres in an
unroadworthy condition.

chunk_00021.text_preview:
9. Tyre or tube damage when the vehicle was being operated outside the geographical area specified in the Schedule
at the time of loss.

chunk_00022.text_preview:
10. Loss or damage arising from contractual liability or arising out of use of the vehicle otherwise than in accordance
with the Limitations as to Use

chunk_00023.text_preview:
11. Any loss or damage sustained whilst the insured or driver was under the influence of intoxicating liquor or drugs.

5. INSURED DECLARED VALUE AND TOTAL LOSS
The IDV is your vehicle's sum insured. It is based on the manufacturer's ex-showroom price reduced for age:

chunk_00172.text_preview:
If your repair cost exceeds 75% of the IDV, we will settle your claim as a Total Loss and pay you the IDV less any
salvage value.
